75506.subject: 🐶📰 Weekend Update
75506.body:
**BTC** $62,677 (0.2%) | **ETH** $1,764 (0.2%) | **SOL** $81 (-0.7%)

———————————————————————————

Welcome to the Daily Bone Weekend Update where we recap the top stories from the  week. Be sure to check out our daily newsletter to get all of your news hot off the press each and every weekday!

———————————————————————————

### Headlines

* Robinhood [gained 20%](https://finance.yahoo.com/quote/HOOD/) on the week after [major announcements](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2072431857023725783?s=20) including the launch of their own blockchain — Launched support for [Trump accounts](https://x.com/RobinhoodApp/status/2071685116984955007?s=20)

* Trump disclosed [$1B+ crypto windfall](https://x.com/DeItaone/status/2072271899040580055?s=20) from TRUMP memecoin and World Liberty Financial token sale

* [Fable 5](https://x.com/claudeai/status/2072402636813607381?s=20) was re-released to the public

* The ANSEM token surpassed a [$380M market cap](https://dexscreener.com/solana/fnzky6x7entq1er3d225dqyt7ybfka4pskbmqhb8l3cc) as Ansem [airdropped millions](https://x.com/lookonchain/status/2071755661160202578?s=20) to memecoin traders

———————————————————————————

### TradFi

* The Dow Jones recorded a [new all-time high](https://x.com/KobeissiLetter/status/2072773557327732952?s=20)

* Amazon announced plans to launch [satellite internet](https://x.com/Cointelegraph/status/2072757306320691652?s=20) competitor to Starlink

* SanDisk fell [below 20-day moving average](https://x.com/Barchart/status/2072886493924790429?s=20) for the first time since March as AI equities pull back across the board

* OpenAI considered giving the US government [5% stake](https://x.com/solidintel_x/status/2072566027339079711?s=20) in company

* Micro will [invest $250M](https://x.com/KobeissiLetter/status/2072357550280847492?s=20) into Trump accounts

———————————————————————————

### Crypto

* Spot Bitcoin ETFs broke a 10-day outflow after recording over [$222M of net inflows](https://farside.co.uk/btc/) on Friday

* Metaplanet [bought $170M](https://x.com/WatcherGuru/status/2072592211854717210?s=20) worth of Bitcoin

* The Winklevoss twins [sold Bitcoin](https://x.com/arkham/status/2072261949656547682?s=20)

* Machi Big Brother continued to [sell Bored Apes](https://x.com/lookonchain/status/2072586936515236049?s=20) to fund perps losses

———————————————————————————

### AI

* Anthropic founder Dario Amodei told lawmakers open source AI is going down a [very dangerous path](https://x.com/coinbureau/status/2071330294452666695?s=20)

* Meta unveiled tech that uses AI to [translate brain activity](https://decrypt.co/372338/meta-brain2qwerty-ai-brain-activity-text) without surgery

* Anthropic hopes to [add Fable 5 back](https://x.com/trq212/status/2072814903170408784?s=20) to Claude Max subscriptions over time when capacity allows — In talks with Samsung to develop [custom chip](https://x.com/tradfi/status/2072679521107812392?s=20)

75505.subject: Your Wirex One upgrade is ready, here's what's still available
75505.body:
More
is open than you might think, full access is one upgrade
away   wirex logo

*****************************************************************
Your account is now
awaiting the upgrade to Wirex
One.
*****************************************************************

Dear
Oleh,

Your Wirex account is ready for its next chapter. As part of this
move, your Wirex account has been partially restricted. External
crypto services are unavailable, but you still have meaningful
access, and upgrading to Wirex One restores
everything.

Still
open:

* Your
card, spending from fiat balance continues
* SEPA in and out, fiat deposits and withdrawals remain open
* Managing your existing products and positions
* Your X-tras subscription, stays active until the end of your
paid period
No
longer available:

* External crypto
deposits and withdrawals
* Card crypto linking, your card is now fiat-only
* Cryptoback™ rewards are paused and are not being calculated or
credited.
* New X-tras upgrades and renewals
* New loans or borrowing more
Upgrade to Wirex
One to restore full access.

Your balance and card
carry over automatically. No starting over. On Wirex One you
get:

* 💸
Up to 8% cashback valued in USD, paid instantly
* 📊 Up to 9.75% APY on stablecoins and crypto
* 🔒 True asset ownership, your keys, your control
* 🌍 24/7 tokenised equity, AMZN, TSLA, MSTR, and
more

Restore full access, upgrade to Wirex One →

75502.subject: Well Informed: How little exercise can you get away with?
75502.body:
<link rel=stylesheet href=https://marber-cdn.economist.com/foundations/latest/css/font-face.css>
 The Economist

 
 


 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5Mjh9AAcAAAAAA5d2CFEHGYfpS--K_uNhCfG3kHq03oyQRGFNYrRO5bnA6551PcAlDb9TQZpGMchPYEeW2sJEHwKZ6AK9K8Y-Asf4Bo07X0BXxdeCKblZISgy 

July 5th 2026

 

 
 
 
Well Informed

 Your evidence-based guide to health and wellness


 
 
 






 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5Mjh9AAcAAAAAA5d2CFEI5gHGjy8Lp5tPeUu0YQd5IXlJyw2OI3B44fHQpCaFh_B0qCvf4LxwqSzfla8EGVsNFheWKU8KmMqqdudrwT2qOVqNQjSyap5fCVeV 

https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5Mjh9AAcAAAAAA5d2CFEJJMPzcJ5Q3CeMqX52ir5WaF_Tj032y6bYzrbVkjUoDtUJAyYzCpeXB_3zx7kSBf4KUeV2zoAyATkb_wLJ-t2b3s08RhbGSSvCY8yz 



 How little exercise can you get away with?


 Tim Cross

Senior science writer


 I am reliably informed that there are people out there who enjoy cardio. My officemate claims to like nothing more than spending hours running up and down fells in various windswept bits of the country, and can talk enthusiastically about ideas like “the pain cave”. Although I try to drag myself out for a couple of short runs every week, for me it’s a bit like brushing your teeth: something you do because it’s good for you.


 My favourite sport is bouldering, which involves brief bursts of hard work followed by several minutes spent sitting on the mats chatting to your mates. So imagine my delight when 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5Mjh9AAcAAAA
